name: Pauline 'Polly' Wilkins Shaver — death and burial (1935)
researcher_question: When did Pauline 'Polly' Wilkins Shaver die, and where is she buried?
notes: Death and burial stripped from the starting tree; the agent must find the death date (30 November 1935, Muhlenberg, Kentucky) and burial place (Shavers Cemetery, Lynn City, Muhlenberg, Kentucky) from Kentucky death records and the Find a Grave index. The subject is well-anchored by birth, multiple census residences spanning 1850–1920, parents (Elijah Wilkins 97YZ-J3D and Sally Wilkins K2BS-YMD), and husband (Williams Timmons Shaver 27HB-Z7R).
